title: Intocraftables
description: Make uncraftable items become craftable! Balanced to not make the game too easy.
body:
This mod will allow uncraftable items be craftable!

This mod dosen't include overpowered items.

**What Items Are Now Craftable? 🔨**
---

- Iron horse armor

- Gold horse armor

- Diamond horse armor

- Cobwebs

- Saddles

- Name tags

- Lead (i know this is craftable, it just seems weird that the recipe requires slimeballs)

- Green dye (made easier to obtain)

---
